name: hotwire-native-agent-kit
description: Audit, build, upgrade, and debug Rails-powered Hotwire Native apps.

interface.longDescription: Audit existing Rails applications, implement Hotwire Native iOS and Android clients, validate navigation and Bridge Components, and diagnose version or lifecycle failures.
defaultPrompt: Audit this Rails app for Hotwire Native readiness.
Build the next verified iOS and Android slice.
Diagnose this Hotwire Native bridge failure.
